# frostmoln_cache_instance (Resource)

Manages a managed cache instance in the Frostmoln platform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `engine` (String) The cache engine type (e.g. "redis", "valkey").
- `engine_version` (String) The engine version (e.g. "7.2", "7.4").
- `flavor_id` (String) The flavor/size for the cache instance (e.g. "cache.gp1.small", "cache.gp1.medium").
- `name` (String) The name of the cache instance.
- `subnet_id` (String) The subnet ID where the cache instance will be deployed.
- `vpc_id` (String) The VPC ID where the cache instance will be deployed.

### Optional

- `eviction_policy` (String) The eviction policy for the cache instance (e.g. "noeviction", "allkeys-lru"). Defaults to "noeviction".
- `persistence_mode` (String) The persistence mode for the cache instance ("rdb", "aof", or "none"). Defaults to "rdb".

### Read-Only

- `admin_username` (String) The admin username for the cache instance.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the instance was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cache instance.
- `port` (Number) The port number the cache instance is listening on.
- `private_ip` (String) The private IP address of the cache instance.
- `status` (String) The current status of the cache instance.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the instance was last updated.
